name: Hot Dog Relish
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel the onions.
2. Chop the peppers and onions together in a large bowl.
3. Add vinegar, sugar, mustard seeds, dry mustard, celery seeds, and salt to the bowl with the chopped vegetables.
4. Mix well until all ingredients are evenly distributed.
5. Transfer the mixture to a jar or container and store in a cool place until ready to use.
